first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in their assessment, score, and reasoning. Both versions identify the same core gap: a lack of specific domain expertise in experimentation and growth systems for a Principal-level role. The minor differences in wording and the estimation of years of experience fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation and are not linked to the change in location from Berlin to Bucharest.
